subcodes.first_line: O Ardeshir! Be thou a mighty lion in the thicket of the Covenant, and to the taste of them that are illumined be as sweet and nourishing as milk and honey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اردشیر در بیشه میثاق شیر ژیان باش و در مذاق اهل اشراق شیر و شکر روح پرور
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
